jobs.name: Fitness daily check-in
jobs.description: Morning fitness plan + Discord follow-up via fitness-coach agent.

payload.message: Daily fitness check-in (America/Los_Angeles). Follow AGENTS.md and HEARTBEAT.md: if coaching.lastDailyPlanDate is not today, build workout + diet, spawn zuzu (personal ops only) to post chart via fitness-discord-post-chart skill, then deliver a short summary. If already planned today, send a brief accountability check-in only.
